mapper.select: SELECT CONCAT('conversation:', BIN_TO_UUID(id)) AS id, NULL AS parentId, 'CONVERSATION' AS nodeType, title AS label, status, '用户与 Agent 的交互上下文' AS summary, created_at AS occurredAt FROM conversation WHERE id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler}

SELECT CONCAT('message:', BIN_TO_UUID(id)) AS id, CONCAT('conversation:', BIN_TO_UUID(conversation_id)) AS parentId, 'MESSAGE' AS nodeType, CASE WHEN role = 'USER' THEN '用户消息' WHEN message_type = 'CLARIFICATION_QUESTION' THEN 'Agent 澄清问题' ELSE 'Agent 用户可见回复' END AS label, message_type AS status, LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(content, '\r', ' '), '\n', ' '), 180) AS summary, created_at AS occurredAt FROM message WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at

SELECT CONCAT('control-turn:', BIN_TO_UUID(id)) AS id, CONCAT('message:', BIN_TO_UUID(source_message_id)) AS parentId, 'CONTROL_TURN' AS nodeType, 'ControlTurn · 控制轮次' AS label, status, CONCAT( '幂等控制轮次', CASE WHEN job_id IS NULL THEN '' ELSE CONCAT(' · Job ', LEFT(BIN_TO_UUID(job_id), 8)) END ) AS summary, created_at AS occurredAt FROM control_turn WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at

SELECT CONCAT('control:', BIN_TO_UUID(id)) AS id, CONCAT('control-turn:', BIN_TO_UUID(control_turn_id)) AS parentId, 'CONTROL_DECISION' AS nodeType, 'Control · 意图识别' AS label, intent_type AS status, decision_summary AS summary, created_at AS occurredAt FROM control_decision WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY created_at

SELECT CONCAT('job:', BIN_TO_UUID(job.id)) AS id, COALESCE( CASE WHEN job.parent_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT( 'loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(derivation.origin_loop_node_id) ) ELSE NULL END, CONCAT('control:', BIN_TO_UUID(decision_record.id)), CONCAT('conversation:', BIN_TO_UUID(job.conversation_id)) ) AS parentId, 'JOB' AS nodeType, CASE WHEN job.template_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Job · 模板任务' WHEN job.parent_job_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Job · 子任务' ELSE 'Job · 根任务' END AS label, job.status, CONCAT( '目标摘要：', LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(job.goal_summary, '\r', ' '), '\n', ' '), 180) ) AS summary, job.created_at AS occurredAt FROM job LEFT JOIN control_decision decision_record ON decision_record.job_id = job.id LEFT JOIN job_derivation derivation ON derivation.child_job_id = job.id WHERE ORDER BY job.created_at

SELECT CONCAT('task:', BIN_TO_UUID(task.id)) AS id, CONCAT('job:', BIN_TO_UUID(task.job_id)) AS parentId, 'TASK' AS nodeType, task.title AS label, task.status, LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(task.goal, '\r', ' '), '\n', ' '), 180) AS summary, task.created_at AS occurredAt FROM task JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY task.created_at

SELECT CONCAT('clarification:', BIN_TO_UUID(request.id)) AS id, COALESCE( CASE WHEN request.loop_node_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT( 'loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(request.loop_node_id) ) ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN request.task_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('task:', BIN_TO_UUID(request.task_id)) ELSE NULL END, CASE WHEN request.job_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('job:', BIN_TO_UUID(request.job_id)) ELSE NULL END, CONCAT('conversation:', BIN_TO_UUID(request.conversation_id)) ) AS parentId, 'CLARIFICATION_REQUEST' AS nodeType, CONCAT('Clarification · ', request.reason_type) AS label, request.status, CONCAT( LEFT( REPLACE(REPLACE(request.question, '\r', ' '), '\n', ' '), 180 ), ' · ', request.source_type ) AS summary, request.created_at AS occurredAt FROM clarification_request request WHERE request.conversation_id = #{conversationId,typeHandler=com.funjson.metaagent.common.persistence.mybatis.UuidBinaryTypeHandler} ORDER BY request.created_at

SELECT CONCAT('task-run:', BIN_TO_UUID(run.id)) AS id, CONCAT('task:', BIN_TO_UUID(run.task_id)) AS parentId, 'TASK_RUN' AS nodeType, CONCAT('TaskRun · 执行 ', run.run_type) AS label, run.status, LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(task.goal, '\r', ' '), '\n', ' '), 180) AS summary, run.started_at AS occurredAt FROM task_run run JOIN task ON task.id = run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY run.started_at

SELECT CONCAT('loop-run:', BIN_TO_UUID(loop_record.id)) AS id, CONCAT( 'task-run:', BIN_TO_UUID(loop_record.task_run_id) ) AS parentId, 'LOOP_RUN' AS nodeType, CONCAT( 'LoopRun · ', loop_record.parent_type ) AS label, loop_record.status, CONCAT( 'Loop Kernel 执行闭环 · 递归深度 ', loop_record.recursion_depth ) AS summary, loop_record.started_at AS occurredAt FROM loop_run loop_record JOIN task_run run ON run.id = loop_record.task_run_id JOIN task ON task.id = run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY loop_record.started_at

SELECT CONCAT('loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(node.id)) AS id, CASE WHEN node.parent_node_id IS NULL THEN CONCAT('loop-run:', BIN_TO_UUID(node.loop_run_id)) ELSE CONCAT('loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(node.parent_node_id)) END AS parentId, 'LOOP_NODE' AS nodeType, CONCAT( 'LoopNode #', node.iteration_no, ' · ', CASE WHEN node.parent_node_id IS NOT NULL AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT( node.input_json, '$.inheritedFeedback' )) LIKE '用户已补充澄清信息%' THEN '澄清恢复' WHEN node.parent_node_id IS NOT NULL THEN '子循环调整' ELSE node.action_type END ) AS label, node.status, CASE WHEN node.parent_node_id IS NOT NULL AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT( node.input_json, '$.inheritedFeedback' )) LIKE '用户已补充澄清信息%' THEN CONCAT( '澄清恢复后重新生成结果 · 目标：', LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(node.goal, '', ' '), '
', ' '), 130) ) WHEN node.parent_node_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT( '根据父节点反馈调整后继续执行 · 目标：', LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(node.goal, '', ' '), '
', ' '), 130) ) ELSE CONCAT( '阶段 ', node.current_phase, ' · 目标：', LEFT(REPLACE(REPLACE(node.goal, '', ' '), '
', ' '), 130) ) END AS summary, node.started_at AS occurredAt FROM loop_node node JOIN loop_run loop_record ON loop_record.id = node.loop_run_id JOIN task_run run ON run.id = loop_record.task_run_id JOIN task ON task.id = run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY node.started_at

SELECT CONCAT('loop-phase:', BIN_TO_UUID(phase.id)) AS id, CONCAT('loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(phase.loop_node_id)) AS parentId, 'LOOP_PHASE' AS nodeType, CONCAT( CASE phase.phase_type WHEN 'CONTEXT_BUILD' THEN '上下文构建' WHEN 'PLANNING' THEN '规划' WHEN 'ACTION_PREPARATION' THEN '动作准备' WHEN 'ACTION_EXECUTION' THEN '动作执行' WHEN 'OBSERVATION' THEN '感知' WHEN 'EVALUATION' THEN '评估' WHEN 'ADJUSTMENT' THEN '调整' ELSE phase.phase_type END, ' · Phase' ) AS label, phase.status, phase.summary, phase.started_at AS occurredAt FROM loop_node_phase phase JOIN loop_node node ON node.id = phase.loop_node_id JOIN loop_run loop_record ON loop_record.id = node.loop_run_id JOIN task_run run ON run.id = loop_record.task_run_id JOIN task ON task.id = run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY node.started_at, phase.sequence_no

SELECT CONCAT('model-call:', BIN_TO_UUID(call_record.id)) AS id, CONCAT('loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(call_record.loop_node_id)) AS parentId, 'MODEL_CALL' AS nodeType, CONCAT('模型调用 · ', call_record.provider) AS label, call_record.status, CONCAT(call_record.model, ' · ', call_record.latency_ms, 'ms') AS summary, call_record.created_at AS occurredAt FROM model_call call_record JOIN loop_node node ON node.id = call_record.loop_node_id JOIN loop_run loop_record ON loop_record.id = node.loop_run_id JOIN task_run run ON run.id = loop_record.task_run_id JOIN task ON task.id = run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY call_record.created_at

SELECT CONCAT('tool-call:', BIN_TO_UUID(invocation.id)) AS id, CONCAT( 'loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(invocation.loop_node_id) ) AS parentId, 'TOOL_CALL' AS nodeType, CONCAT('Tool · ', invocation.tool_id) AS label, invocation.status, COALESCE( invocation.error_message, LEFT( REPLACE( REPLACE(CAST(invocation.result_json AS CHAR), '\r', ' '), '\n', ' ' ), 180 ), invocation.tool_type ) AS summary, invocation.created_at AS occurredAt FROM tool_invocation invocation JOIN job ON job.id = invocation.job_id WHERE ORDER BY invocation.created_at

SELECT CONCAT( 'capability-load:', BIN_TO_UUID(load_record.id) ) AS id, CONCAT( 'loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(load_record.loop_node_id) ) AS parentId, 'CAPABILITY_LOAD' AS nodeType, CONCAT( 'Skill · ', source.name ) AS label, load_record.status, CONCAT( load_record.capability_type, ' · ', load_record.scope_root_type, CASE WHEN load_record.inherited_from_load_id IS NULL THEN ' · DIRECT' ELSE ' · INHERITED' END ) AS summary, load_record.created_at AS occurredAt FROM capability_load load_record JOIN capability_source source ON source.id = load_record.source_id AND source.version = load_record.source_version JOIN loop_node node ON node.id = load_record.loop_node_id JOIN loop_run loop_record ON loop_record.id = node.loop_run_id JOIN task_run run ON run.id = loop_record.task_run_id JOIN task ON task.id = run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY load_record.created_at

SELECT CONCAT('checkpoint:', BIN_TO_UUID(checkpoint.id)) AS id, CASE WHEN checkpoint.loop_node_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(checkpoint.loop_node_id)) ELSE CONCAT('task-run:', BIN_TO_UUID(checkpoint.task_run_id)) END AS parentId, 'CHECKPOINT' AS nodeType, CONCAT('Checkpoint · ', checkpoint.checkpoint_type) AS label, CASE WHEN checkpoint.restorable THEN 'RESTORABLE' ELSE 'AUDIT_ONLY' END AS status, '可恢复状态快照' AS summary, checkpoint.created_at AS occurredAt FROM checkpoint JOIN task_run run ON run.id = checkpoint.task_run_id JOIN task ON task.id = run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY checkpoint.created_at

SELECT CONCAT('evidence:', BIN_TO_UUID(evidence.id)) AS id, CASE WHEN evidence.loop_node_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('loop-node:', BIN_TO_UUID(evidence.loop_node_id)) ELSE CONCAT('task-run:', BIN_TO_UUID(evidence.task_run_id)) END AS parentId, 'EVIDENCE' AS nodeType, CONCAT('完成证据 · ', evidence.evidence_type) AS label, evidence.result AS status, evidence.subject_ref AS summary, evidence.created_at AS occurredAt FROM evidence JOIN task_run run ON run.id = evidence.task_run_id JOIN task ON task.id = run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY evidence.created_at

SELECT CONCAT( 'recovery-attempt:', BIN_TO_UUID(attempt.id) ) AS id, CASE WHEN attempt.checkpoint_id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT( 'checkpoint:', BIN_TO_UUID(attempt.checkpoint_id) ) ELSE CONCAT( 'task-run:', BIN_TO_UUID(attempt.task_run_id) ) END AS parentId, 'RECOVERY_ATTEMPT' AS nodeType, CONCAT( 'Recovery · ', attempt.disposition ) AS label, attempt.status, CONCAT( attempt.interruption_type, ' · ', attempt.decision_code ) AS summary, attempt.requested_at AS occurredAt FROM recovery_attempt attempt JOIN task_run run ON run.id = attempt.task_run_id JOIN task ON task.id = run.task_id JOIN job ON job.id = task.job_id WHERE ORDER BY attempt.requested_at

SELECT CONCAT('job-completion:', BIN_TO_UUID(event.id)) AS id, CONCAT('job:', BIN_TO_UUID(event.job_id)) AS parentId, 'JOB_COMPLETION' AS nodeType, 'Job · 完成验收' AS label, event.event_type AS status, 'Job 层根据 TaskGraph、结果与证据收敛 Job 终态' AS summary, event.created_at AS occurredAt FROM runtime_event event JOIN job ON job.id = event.job_id WHERE AND event.event_type IN ('JOB_COMPLETED', 'JOB_FAILED') ORDER BY event.created_at
